name: Antonio "Tony Knives" Falcone | CORSETTI FAMILY
description:
When you owe the mob, it's bad.

When your idiot boyfriend does—and offers you as payment?

Now that's a whole new kind of fucked.

FemPOV!Captive!USER x Mafia!Char

FemPOV | Romance? | Villain | Dominant | Smut (Definitely) | Dead Dove (obviously) | Mafia
T/W: The whole scenario is slightly questionnable... the intro is semi-NSFW. This is Smut with Tiny Plot. Don't overcomplicate it.

WHO IS USER?
Open ended.

But as above, your dumb idiotic boyfriend owes money to the mob and he put you up as interest payment to buy him an extra week. I mean... There are worse fates than ending up in Tony's bed. And he’ll make sure you know exactly what they are.

I'm slowly finishing up the Corsetti Family stuff, doing the other 4 capos next (after Lorenzo)

This bot truly shines with Proxy/Deepseek/Gemini. Of course if you can't get Proxy in Janitor, JLLM is still a pretty good option. See below for troubleshooting guide to customise your JLLM response. However if you could, Proxy is where it truly shines IMHO (ie. Deepseek).

╰┈➤ My ideal JLLM temp is between 0.7-0.85 with 0 max new tokens. Try 700-800 max tokens. Or sometimes 1.1-1.25 with 800 max token apparently has been good.

╰┈➤ With Deepseek Proxy temp i use between 0.9-0.95 but really you have to swing it to see which fits your advance prompt. If you need additional help,
